name: ArcelorMittal
description: ArcelorMittal is a leading global steel and mining company, headquartered in Luxembourg City. Formed in 2006 through the merger of Arcelor and Mittal Steel, the corporation operates in over 60 countries and is a primary supplier of high-quality steel to the automotive, construction, household appliance, and packaging industries. The company is committed to developing smarter, more sustainable steels through innovative processes that reduce energy consumption and carbon emissions. As one of the world's largest steel producers, ArcelorMittal plays a critical role in the global industrial supply chain while focusing on long-term environmental and operational excellence.
